original text:
3. Press and Hold image until the "Save Image" appears.
2.Click the download arrow in the lower right corner.
All images inside of your galley are UNEDITED images. Please take this time to choose your 5 favorite images from your proofing gallery for retouching. Under each image, there is 4 digit number. Please email the 4-digit number to photos@bmckenny.com and within 4 -15 days your selected images will be professionally retouched and placed back into your gallery!
